negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_231
prompt: In a bright, modern kitchen with white cabinets and a stainless steel oven, two children are seated at a granite countertop. The boy with curly hair, wearing a white t-shirt, is holding a dark mug near his right ear, appearing to listen intently. To his right, the girl with braided hair tied with a red hair tie, wearing a white and pink top, holds a partially eaten slice of bread topped with white spread and two red items. The kitchen counter is adorned with a bowl of cereal, a glass bottle, and a white mug. An adult in a pink shirt is partially visible on the left side of the frame. As the video progresses, a woman in a brown shirt and blue nail polish enters from the right, gently touching the girl’s right shoulder and right cheek before kissing her left cheek. The final frame captures the girl smiling warmly, while the boy continues to hold the mug.
